title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: To Realme Buds T500 Pro ko dosto aap definitely game changer earbuds bol sakti ho
chunks.translated_text: To Realme Buds T500 Pro friends you are definitely game changer earbuds bol shakti ho.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Kyuki ye jo features provide kar raha hai, 2,500 rupe ke aas paas
chunks.translated_text: Because of the features it is providing, it costs around Rs 2,500.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Iss time par doosre nahi provide kar raha hai bilkul
chunks.translated_text: At this time others are not providing at all.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Yaha par Tech Vegan leather finish aapko milne wala hai
chunks.translated_text: Here you will get Tech Vegan leather finish.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Aur brand ka kehna hai ye world ke first candy inspired earbuds hai
chunks.translated_text: And the brand says these are the world's first candy inspired earbuds.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Saati mein lanyard aapko box ke andar hi milne wala hai
chunks.translated_text: You can find the lanyard at the end of your box at the moment.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Isko latka ke kahin bhi bhi ghuma phira sakte hain

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Aur Realme lege application me aap bhar bhar ke customization bhi kar sakte hain
chunks.translated_text: And in Realme lege application you can also do various customizations.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: 6 mic se setup hai noise cancellation feature ke saath
chunks.translated_text: Setup with 6 mics with noise cancellation feature

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Jiski calling mujhe normal condition, traffic condition me dono hi kaafi impressive lagi
chunks.translated_text: Because calling me in normal condition, in traffic condition, both are quite impressive.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Aur jo output hai dosto kaafi aapko well balanced, rich output milne wala hai
chunks.translated_text: And the output is very good, friends, you are getting a well balanced, rich output.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Clarity ko leke, vocals ko leke dikkat nahi aayegi
chunks.translated_text: Look for clarity, look for vocals, you will not notice

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Mujhe yeh definitely dosto all rounder earbuds lage
chunks.translated_text: These are definitely all rounder earbuds for me friends.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Price point ke isaaf se iska detail heavy testing wala video
chunks.translated_text: Price point ke isaaf se iska detail heavy testing no video

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Aur waise aap woh kahin na kahin tagde products mil jayenge
chunks.translated_text: And that's how you will get those tagged products at one place or another.

chunks.title: Realme-Buds-T500-Pro-GAME-CHANGER-EARBUD_Media_9CAtXtQEDKo_002_720p.mp4.mp3
chunks.original_text: Doston ke saath is earbuds ko share karna mat boliye
chunks.translated_text: Don't share your earbuds with your friend.

full_text: To Realme Buds T500 Pro ko dosto aap definitely game changer earbuds bol sakti ho Kyuki ye jo features provide kar raha hai, 2,500 rupe ke aas paas Iss time par doosre nahi provide kar raha hai bilkul Sabse pehle look and feel ki baat karenge Yaha par Tech Vegan leather finish aapko milne wala hai Case part ko lekar bahut hi compact case hai Aur brand ka kehna hai ye world ke first candy inspired earbuds hai Saati mein lanyard aapko box ke andar hi milne wala hai Isko latka ke kahin bhi bhi ghuma phira sakte hain Buds aapko stamp shape ke milne ge Front me aesa gold plated lagta hai Back side me aapko glass finish mil jayega Fitting kaanam aapko kaafi secure milne wali hai LHGC 5.2 High Edition codec ka support Triple device pairing ka option In-ear detection feature 50 decibel ka flagship noise cancellation feature ANC mode tagde tarike se work karta hai Transparency ko leke dikkat nahi lagi Aur Realme lege application me aap bhar bhar ke customization bhi kar sakte hain 6 mic se setup hai noise cancellation feature ke saath Jiski calling mujhe normal condition, traffic condition me dono hi kaafi impressive lagi Aur jo output hai dosto kaafi aapko well balanced, rich output milne wala hai Clarity ko leke, vocals ko leke dikkat nahi aayegi Bass yaapko kaafi soft balanced milne wale hai Extra powerful boosted bass nahi hai Mujhe yeh definitely dosto all rounder earbuds lage Price point ke isaaf se iska detail heavy testing wala video Humare channel pe live ho chuka hai Definitely check out kijiye usko Aur iska aap wo comparison kis ke saath chahiye Comment me zarur batayiye Hum try karenge aapke liye lekar a jaye Aur waise aap woh kahin na kahin tagde products mil jayenge Aap check out kar sakte hai iska current price Doston ke saath is earbuds ko share karna mat boliye And subscribe for more such videos
